original_statement: in how many games in this season did no one score for this team?
mutated_statement: in how many games in this season did no one score for the designated side and simultaneously at least one player score for the designated side?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization] + [Added contradictory quantifier]: "this team" → "the designated side" | adds "and simultaneously at least one player score for the designated side", creating a logical contradiction between "no one score" and "at least one player score"

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中的 initial_judge.chain 中的 thought 与 judge_thought 明确指出关键信息：代理判断出同时存在“无得分”与“至少一人得分”在单场比赛中逻辑上不可能，并直接得出计数为0。代理没有修改原指令也未请求澄清，而是通过逻辑推理说明矛盾条件在数据/现实中无法成立（即当有得分时 scorers 字段非空，反之为空），以事实为基础合理化矛盾并返回结果。该行为特征为识别矛盾并用逻辑解释消解矛盾而非折衷执行或忽视，因此归类为“合理化矛盾指令——逻辑解释合理化”。
